paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: BlenderBot 3 integrates continual learning from real-world user interactions to adapt responsibly to evolving conversational needs, combining pre-training with dynamic fine-tuning across diverse topics like science, history, and storytelling
raw_extraction.application: Open-ended conversational engagement, long-term memory retention, multi-topic discussion, and continual adaptation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing robust, continually improving conversational AI systems
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Continual learning from organic user conversations via deployment
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: BlenderBot 3 integrates continual learning from real-world user interactions to adapt responsibly to evolving conversational needs, combining pre-training with dynamic fine-tuning across diverse topics like science, history, and storytelling
raw_extraction.application: Advanced conversational engagement, complex topic handling, and nuanced response generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing robust, continually improving conversational AI systems
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Continual learning from organic user conversations via deployment
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: BlenderBot 3 demonstrates superior safety and performance in real-world conversations compared to OPT-175B, leveraging extensive pre-training and continual learning mechanisms while maintaining ethical safeguards
raw_extraction.application: High-capacity conversational assistance, specialized task execution, and research collaboration
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing advanced conversational capabilities with safety and responsibility in large language models
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on specific tasks with restricted access for academic researchers
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a modular, multi-stage conversational agent framework combining internet search, memory retrieval, and knowledge grounding with specialized fine-tuning across 13 distinct modules. Uses a hybrid approach of beam search and factual nucleus sampling tailored per module
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus + additional proprietary datasets (not fully specified)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, open-domain dialogue systems, multi-turn interaction management, factually grounded responses
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing robust, safe, and contextually aware conversational agents capable of handling diverse dialogue scenarios
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-module fine-tuning across decision-making, memory, knowledge extraction, and dialogue generation tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: Enhanced version of BB3-3B with increased capacity for complex reasoning and long-term memory retention through extensive multi-task fine-tuning across 13 specialized modules, optimized for high contextual awareness and factual consistency
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale proprietary text corpus including BooksCorpus
raw_extraction.application: Advanced conversational assistants, multi-session dialogue management, knowledge-intensive interactions
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling conversational intelligence while maintaining safety and robustness across diverse dialogue contexts
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-module fine-tuning across decision-making, memory, knowledge extraction, and dialogue generation tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: High-capacity conversational agent optimized for real-time web search integration, factual nucleus sampling for diversity control, and specialized generation techniques (e.g., repetition penalties) across 13 modules to balance accuracy, safety, and engagement
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Combination of BooksCorpus and proprietary datasets (~1.13B tokens)
raw_extraction.application: Enterprise-grade conversational interfaces, knowledge-grounded dialogue systems, real-time information retrieval
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating scalable, context-sensitive conversational agents capable of dynamic knowledge integration and safe interaction management
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-module fine-tuning across decision-making, memory, knowledge extraction, and dialogue generation tasks with specialized generation strategies
